nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dahn
meanings: habitational name from a place in the Palatinate called Dahn.
(Dähn): ethnic name for a Dane, from Old Norse Dan-.

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Dene was born in 1157, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Amfridus de Denne II, was 35 and his mother, Beatrice Bassett, was 37. He had at least 1 son with Sybell de Gatton. He died in 1190, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Dene est né en 1157, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Amfridus de Denne II, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Bassett, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sybell de Gatton. Il est décédé en 1190, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Dene 1157 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Amfridus de Denne II 35 und seine Mutter Beatrice Bassett 37. Er hatte mit Sybell de Gatton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Dene è nato il nel 1157 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Amfridus de Denne II, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Bassett, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sybell de Gatton. Morì nel 1190, nel Kingston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Dene(이)가 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Amfridus de Denne II(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Bassett(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Sybell de Gatton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Dene родился в 1157 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Amfridus de Denne II было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Bassett, 37. es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Dene nació en 1157, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Amfridus de Denne II, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Beatrice Bassett, tenía 37 años.
